evals.prompt: Which markets are fluctuating dramatically now? Show me the markets with the largest probability changes in the past hour
evals.expected_output: List the markets with the largest probability changes in the past hour (Top 5~10), each showing: market name (clickable link), old probability → new probability (change percentage), volume change, latest trade time, AI speculated reason, sorted by change magnitude descending

assertions.name: shows_probability_change
assertions.description: Output contains specific probability numbers in format X% → Y% (old → new probability)

assertions.name: shows_volume_change
assertions.description: Output contains volume change information (increase percentage or absolute amount)

assertions.name: market_link_present
assertions.description: At least one market name has a clickable polymarket.com link

assertions.name: data_not_fabricated
assertions.description: Output comes from actual shared data query, not fabricated example data; or clearly explains errors when data service is unavailable

assertions.name: sorted_by_magnitude
assertions.description: Market list sorted by probability change magnitude descending, item 1 change >= item 2

evals.prompt: Help me check crypto market probability fluctuations in the past 2 hours, I only care about changes exceeding 8%
evals.expected_output: Query crypto (CRY) domain markets in the past 2 hours, filter for probability changes >=8%, same format as basic query; clearly inform if no markets meet criteria

assertions.name: respects_window_param
assertions.description: Query time window is 2 hours (not default 1 hour)

assertions.name: respects_threshold_param
assertions.description: Only show markets with probability change >= 8% (or clearly explain no markets meet criteria)

assertions.name: filters_crypto_domain
assertions.description: Only show crypto-related markets (bitcoin/ethereum/crypto, etc.), no mixing with politics/sports and other domains

assertions.name: handles_empty_gracefully
assertions.description: If crypto domain currently has no movements >=8%, give clear notice rather than returning error

evals.prompt: Help me set an alert: crypto and politics markets, tell me when probability fluctuates more than 15% in 1 hour. Also, I previously set an all-market 10% alert, list that for me too
evals.expected_output: 1) Create a new alert (CRY+POL, threshold 15%, 1h window), output confirmation with trigger condition/coverage/frequency estimate; 2) List all existing alerts (including new + historical)

assertions.name: alert_config_saved
assertions.description: Wrote new alert record to scripts/state/alerts.json containing threshold_pct=15, domains=[CRY,POL], window_hours=1

assertions.name: confirmation_shows_parameters
assertions.description: Output confirmation clearly shows: trigger condition (>15%), coverage (crypto+politics)

assertions.name: lists_existing_alerts
assertions.description: Also shows list of existing alerts (even if historical alert doesn't exist, gives notice)

assertions.name: frequency_estimate_provided
assertions.description: Gives estimated trigger frequency for this alert (can be 'X times per day' or 'frequency unknown')
